latest_news.headline: Trump: 'No ceasefire' with Iran - 'you don't ceasefire when obliterating'
latest_news.text: Trump explicitly rules out ceasefire: 'You don't do a ceasefire when you're literally obliterating the other side.' Contradicts earlier 'winding down' rhetoric. Major hawkish pivot.

latest_news.headline: Pentagon deploys 3 more warships + 2,500 Marines to Middle East
latest_news.text: Pentagon announces 3 additional warships and 2,500 Marines deploying to Middle East. Combined with earlier deployments, massive US military buildup continues.

latest_news.headline: Iran FM Araghchi rejects dialogue with United States
latest_news.text: Iran Foreign Minister Araghchi explicitly rejects any dialogue with the United States. Diplomatic off-ramp closed.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: NEW: Israel strikes Sweida province Syria (Druze protection). Saudi + Turkey condemn. Potential new tracker trigger - monitoring.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 73% (up). Day 22 Hour 12 - IMMINENT. Fresh Beirut strikes, 7 neighborhoods. 12 medical workers killed in Hezbollah health center strike. Litani push ongoing. Updated 2026-03-21T12:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut - 7 neighborhoods evacuated
latest_news.text: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut early Saturday. Evacuation warnings for 7 neighborhoods in southern suburbs. Jets bombed Beirut at 3am. Ghandouriyeh house strike kills 1, wounds 2.

latest_news.headline: WaPo: Israel strikes Hezbollah health center, kills 12 medical workers
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit Hezbollah-run health center in southern Lebanon, killed 12 medical workers. Israel widens campaign beyond fighters to civilian infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.text: Russian forces suffer deadliest day of 2026: 1,610 killed in past 24 hours. Total Russian casualties since Feb 2022 now approximately 1,285,700. Fighting intense despite peace talk pauses.

latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 12. DE-ESCALATION: Trump 'winding down' rhetoric, US eases oil sanctions, Hormuz handoff to allies, oil sanctions relief. ESCALATION: Israel Katz says strikes 'will significantly escalate', fresh Natanz strike, Diego Garcia missiles, Putin eyes new offensive, drone kills Iraq intel officer, NATO cowards rhetoric. NET: Contradictory signals — US signals exit while Israel signals escalation. Watch for Israel acting independently.

latest_news.headline: Israel Katz: US-Israel strikes on Iran will 'significantly escalate' in coming days
latest_news.text: Israel's Defense Minister Katz says IDF and US military strikes 'will significantly escalate' in coming days. Determined to 'decapitate commanders and thwart strategic capabilities'. Directly contradicts Trump 'winding down' rhetoric.

latest_news.headline: Trump: Hormuz 'guarded by other nations — US does not need it'
latest_news.text: Trump Truth Social: 'Hormuz Strait will have to be guarded by other Nations who use it — US does not! If asked we will help but shouldn't be necessary once Iran's threat eradicated.' Major signal of US disengagement from Hormuz.

latest_news.headline: Putin eyes new offensive as peace talks stall amid Iran war
latest_news.text: With US-brokered Ukraine peace talks on hold due to Iran war, Putin expected to launch new offensives to expand military gains. Russia refuses March 21 talks with Ukraine-US.

latest_news.headline: Drone kills officer at Iraq intelligence HQ in Baghdad
latest_news.text: Iranian-backed drone strikes near Iraq's intelligence headquarters in Baghdad, kills officer. Launched by 'outlaw groups'. NATO just withdrew all troops from Iraq advisory mission.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 22, 12:04 UTC) - Day 22 of Iran war. CONFLICTING SIGNALS: Trump "no ceasefire" but also "winding down" rhetoric. Hormuz selectively easing (Japan allowed through). Iran considers individual country deals. ISRAEL ESCALATION: Natanz struck again, Netanyahu wants ground component. IRAN PERSISTENCE: 70th wave, refinery strikes continue, Araghchi rejects dialogue. RUSSIA-UKRAINE: Deadliest day 1,700+ KIA, peace talks stalled by Iran war. PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN: Eid ceasefire holding, post-Eid resumption feared. Updated 2026-03-21T12:04:00Z
